The overall sentiment of these customer reviews is extremely positive, with customers expressing their strong affinity for the Puerto Rican coffee brand Yaucono. The rich and unique flavor of the coffee is another common theme, with customers comparing it favorably to other popular brands and expressing a desire to purchase in bulk. it only takes a cursory look at my reviewing history to realize that i haven't exactly made a career out of rating gum, but this new trident vitality is so darn good that i thought i'd better get in a few words on it. i've tried all three of the available flavors and can't seem to choose a favorite. the peppermint with ginseng flavor reviewed here is definitely pretty awesome. the gum has the physical profile of an old-school chicklet. it only takes a bite or two for the strong peppermint flavor to kick in. and man, does this gum last. i can usually go a good 3-4 hours and still get some flavor out of this stuff. that makes it a good value in my book for sure. typically retails for around 1.39 pack at my local grocer, although i've caught it on sale for under a dollar once or twice. Summary:
The overall sentiment of the customer reviews is positive, with customers praising the long-lasting flavor and strong peppermint taste of Trident Vitality gum. The gum's old-school chicklet texture is also mentioned as a key strength. However, some customers expressed disappointment with the lack of information on the packaging, including the absence of ingredients and a clear description of the product's benefits. The taste of the gum was described as similar to any other gum by one customer.

The overall sentiment of the customer reviews is overwhelmingly positive, with customers praising the product's stunning sparkle and fast delivery. The key product strength mentioned in multiple reviews is the glitter's ability to add a significant visual impact to cakes and other treats. Common complaints include the other type of edible glitter not living up to expectations in terms of appearance and taste. Some customers also expressed disappointment that the product was not truly edible as advertised. However, the majority of reviews are highly recommended and express satisfaction with the product and the speedy delivery.

The overall sentiment of the customer reviews is positive, with many customers praising the convenience and taste of the bite-sized licorice pieces. The key product strengths mentioned include the ease of grabbing multiple pieces at once, the good taste of the black and cherry flavors, and the less messy nature of the product compared to traditional licorice. Common complaints include the occasional issue with bags breaking open during shipping. Some customers also noted that the strawberry flavor was not as strong as they had hoped. Additionally, a few customers mentioned that the pieces in the bag seemed to be smaller than previous purchases.

The overall sentiment of the customer reviews is positive, with several customers expressing their love for the product and purchasing it repeatedly. The key product strengths mentioned include the soft and slightly chewy texture, which is preferred over gummy candies, and the sugar coating that enhances the flavor. However, some customers noted that the candies are heavily coated with sugar and are too sweet for their taste. Common complaints include the high sugar content and the fact that the candies are not sweet without the sugar coating.
